understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to maneuver selectable pieces (likely P and S) into position, possibly onto goal markers (+), by switching control between them and moving them across the grid within a limited step budget per level.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement shifts the selected piece (P) by 3 pixels per cell in the chosen direction, potentially pushing adjacent pushable blocks (B); walls (#) block movement variably; CLICK switches selection to another selectable piece (S) at the exact pixel coordinates without consuming extra steps beyond the action cost; rapid clicking between pieces was possible but inefficient, wasting the step budget without achieving level completion.
